testcase.name: App routing > renders / at the correct route
App routing > renders /submissions at the correct route
App routing > renders /submissions/new at the correct route
App routing > renders /submissions/submission-1 at the correct route
App routing > renders /renewals at the correct route
App routing > renders /renewals/renewal-1 at the correct route
App routing > renders /brokers at the correct route
App routing > renders /brokers/new at the correct route
App routing > renders /brokers/broker-1 at the correct route
App routing > renders /carrier-markets at the correct route
App routing > renders /tasks at the correct route
App routing > renders /login at the correct route
App routing > renders /auth/callback at the correct route
App routing > renders /unauthorized at the correct route
App routing > renders /missing-route at the correct route
useSidebarProvider > reads collapsed state from local storage and persists toggles
useSidebarProvider > opens and closes mobile navigation and resets it on desktop resize
useSidebarProvider > exposes sidebar state through the context hook
useThemeProvider > defaults to dark theme and toggles to light theme
useThemeProvider > reads the initial theme from local storage and exposes it through useTheme
Sidebar > links Operational Reports directly to the F0037 rollups tab
Sidebar > exposes billing and marks nested billing routes active
CreateAccountPage — S0007 wiring regression > creates an account with the same display name and navigates (unchanged)
CreateAccountPage — S0007 wiring regression > blocks submit with a validation error for an empty display name (unchanged)
CreateAccountPage — S0007 wiring regression > registers with F0035 so dirty values snapshot on a forced re-auth
CreateBrokerPage — S0007 wiring regression > creates a broker with the same payload and navigates (unchanged)
CreateBrokerPage — S0007 wiring regression > blocks submit and shows validation errors for empty required fields (unchanged)
CreateBrokerPage — S0007 wiring regression > registers with F0035 so dirty values snapshot on a forced re-auth
CreatePolicyPage — S0007 wiring regression > registers the native policy form with F0035 so dirty values snapshot
CreateSubmissionPage — S0007 wiring regression > blocks submit with validation errors for missing required fields (unchanged)
CreateSubmissionPage — S0007 wiring regression > registers the native submission form with F0035 so dirty values snapshot
RenewalsPage create modal — S0007 wiring regression > creates a renewal with the same policyId payload (unchanged)
RenewalsPage create modal — S0007 wiring regression > registers the create form with F0035 so dirty values snapshot on a forced re-auth
AuthCallbackPage > redirects broker users to the brokers route after a successful callback
AuthCallbackPage > redirects non-broker users to the dashboard route after a successful callback
AuthCallbackPage > uses the remembered landing route when the exact callback was already completed
AuthCallbackPage > treats an in-flight strict-mode replay as a no-op
AuthCallbackPage > falls back to the remembered landing route when a replayed callback throws after prior success
AuthCallbackPage > clears stale state and redirects to login when the callback fails without a remembered success
AuthCallbackPage > navigates to a safe return_to from OIDC state after draining deferred telemetry
AuthCallbackPage > preserves callback success when deferred telemetry drain fails
AuthCallbackPage > rejects unsafe return_to values and falls back to the role landing route
Modal > traps focus and closes on Escape
Modal > closes on backdrop click and does not render when closed
Popover > opens from a native trigger, traps focus, and closes on Escape
Popover > supports non-native triggers and overlay dismissal on small screens
Popover > closes when clicking outside the popover content
Tabs > changes tabs on click and keyboard navigation
AdminConfigurationWorkspace > renders governed domains, validation controls, rollback history, and audit details
AdminConfigurationWorkspace > shows retry and empty states when domain loading fails or returns no data
LoginPage > renders the Sign In button
LoginPage > shows session_expired notice when reason=session_expired
LoginPage > shows callback_failed error when error=callback_failed
LoginPage > shows misconfiguration error when OIDC env vars are missing
LoginPage > calls oidcUserManager.signinRedirect() when Sign In is clicked
LoginPage > passes return_to through OIDC state when present
LoginPage > shows IdP-unavailable error when signinRedirect throws
ProtectedRoute > renders children when session is valid and non-expired
ProtectedRoute > redirects to /login when no session exists
ProtectedRoute > renews expired sessions before rendering protected content
ProtectedRoute > emits forced reauth when expired-session renewal fails
ProtectedRoute > renders null during loading (no content flash)
nebula-auth-mode-guard — buildStart hook logic > throws when VITE_AUTH_MODE=dev AND NODE_ENV=production
nebula-auth-mode-guard — buildStart hook logic > is a no-op when VITE_AUTH_MODE=dev AND NODE_ENV=development
nebula-auth-mode-guard — buildStart hook logic > is a no-op when VITE_AUTH_MODE=oidc AND NODE_ENV=production
nebula-auth-mode-guard — buildStart hook logic > is a no-op when VITE_AUTH_MODE is unset AND NODE_ENV=production
nebula-auth-mode-guard — buildStart hook logic > process.env integration: throws when both env vars match danger combo
nebula-auth-mode-guard — buildStart hook logic > process.env integration: is a no-op when VITE_AUTH_MODE=dev and NODE_ENV=development
nebula-auth-mode-guard — buildStart hook logic > process.env integration: is a no-op when VITE_AUTH_MODE=oidc and NODE_ENV=production
nebula-auth-mode-guard — buildStart hook logic > process.env integration: is a no-op when VITE_AUTH_MODE is unset and NODE_ENV=production
useCurrentUser > maps the active oidc profile into the current user model
useCurrentUser > reacts to oidc user lifecycle events
useSessionTeardown — reason: session_expired > redirects to /login?reason=session_expired
useSessionTeardown — reason: session_expired > clears OIDC state (removeUser + clearStaleState) before redirecting
useSessionTeardown — reason: session_expired > completes teardown even if POST /auth/logout throws a network error
useSessionTeardown — reason: session_expired > completes teardown even if POST /auth/logout returns a non-2xx status
useSessionTeardown — reason: logout > redirects to /login with no query string
useSessionTeardown — reason: logout > calls oidcUserManager.removeUser() and clearStaleState()
useSessionTeardown — reason: logout > calls POST /auth/logout with correct method and credentials
useSessionTeardown — reason: logout > still clears OIDC state and redirects even if logout endpoint call fails
useSessionTeardown — reason: logout > clears OIDC state before redirecting
useAuthEventHandler — 401 interceptor wiring > triggers teardown with session_expired when auth event is emitted
useAuthEventHandler — 401 interceptor wiring > unsubscribes from auth events on unmount — no teardown after unmount
F0026 billing UI > renders accessible source-authorized invoices and capture workflows
F0026 billing UI > wires explicit exact application with selected receipt context
F0026 billing UI > wires reference correction and manager decision as separate flows
BrokerInsightsWorkspace > renders scorecard, trend, benchmark, and snapshot panels for an authorized broker
BrokerInsightsWorkspace > passes broker filter changes into the scorecard query
ContactFormModal restore — F0036-S0008 (closes F0035 finding #1) > restores the snapshot on mount (winning over the on-open reset) and does NOT auto-replay
ContactFormModal restore — F0036-S0008 (closes F0035 finding #1) > waits to consume a modal snapshot until the parent reopens the form
ContactFormModal restore — F0036-S0008 (closes F0035 finding #1) > does not restore another user’s snapshot (per-user isolation)
ContactFormModal restore — F0036-S0008 (closes F0035 finding #1) > restores only from its own form_key (no cross-form contamination)
ContactFormModal restore — F0036-S0008 (closes F0035 finding #1) > round-trips: dirty edit -> forced-re-auth snapshot -> remount restores
ContactFormModal — S0007 wiring regression (create + edit preserved) > creates a contact with the same payload as before wiring
ContactFormModal — S0007 wiring regression (create + edit preserved) > blocks submit and shows validation errors for empty required fields (unchanged)
ContactFormModal — S0007 wiring regression (create + edit preserved) > edits an existing contact with the same update payload (incl. rowVersion)
ContactFormModal — S0007 wiring regression (create + edit preserved) > still surfaces a server error on submit failure (error path unchanged by wiring)

failure.message:
Unable to find an element with the text: /modified by another user|Unable to create contact/i. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. In this case, you can provide a function for your text matcher to make your matcher more flexible. Ignored nodes: comments, script, style [36m[39m [36m

testcase.failure:
TestingLibraryElementError: Unable to find an element with the text: /modified by another user|Unable to create contact/i. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. In this case, you can provide a function for your text matcher to make your matcher more flexible. Ignored nodes: comments, script, style

Add Contact

Full name is required.

Ignored nodes: comments, script, style

Add Contact

Full name is required.

❯ waitForWrapper node_modules/.pnpm/@testing-library+dom@10.4.1/node_modules/@testing-library/dom/dist/wait-for.js:163:27 ❯ node_modules/.pnpm/@testing-library+dom@10.4.1/node_modules/@testing-library/dom/dist/query-helpers.js:86:33 ❯ src/features/brokers/tests/ContactFormModal.test.tsx:94:25

testcase.name: ContactFormModal — S0007 wiring regression (create + edit preserved) > registers with F0035 so dirty values snapshot on a forced re-auth
EditBrokerModal — S0007 wiring regression > updates a broker with the same payload (incl. rowVersion)
EditBrokerModal — S0007 wiring regression > blocks submit with a validation error when legal name is cleared (unchanged)
EditBrokerModal — S0007 wiring regression > still surfaces a server error on submit failure (error path unchanged)
EditBrokerModal — S0007 wiring regression > registers with F0035 so dirty values snapshot on a forced re-auth
broker validation helpers > validates broker creation payloads
broker validation helpers > validates broker update payloads
broker validation helpers > validates contact payloads
F0025 commission UI > shows searchable expected commission records and rollup totals
F0025 commission UI > wires recalculation from the detail page
HierarchyPanel > renders the root-to-node breadcrumb and the children list
HierarchyPanel > exposes a set-parent control
ParentDocumentsPanel > renders parent-scoped documents and completeness counts
shared registration helper — dual backend (F0036-S0007) > snapshots both an RHF form and a controlled form through the same helper
shared registration helper — dual backend (F0036-S0007) > restores both backends on mount through the same helper
shared registration helper — dual backend (F0036-S0007) > restores when a modal parent changes the registered form key after mount
shared registration helper — dual backend (F0036-S0007) > does not consume a modal snapshot until registration is enabled
deepEqual equality matrix (F0036-S0007) > scalar typed-and-cleared back to initial is equal
deepEqual equality matrix (F0036-S0007) > treats undefined / null / absent key as equal
deepEqual equality matrix (F0036-S0007) > compares numbers and Dates by value
deepEqual equality matrix (F0036-S0007) > nested-object replacement with structurally-equal contents is equal (not reference)
deepEqual equality matrix (F0036-S0007) > array reorder of identical contents is not dirty by default; order-sensitive flags it
diffPaths (F0036-S0007) > reports flattened JSON paths for differing leaves
diffPaths (F0036-S0007) > reports the array path when array contents differ
diffPaths (F0036-S0007) > reports indexed paths when order-sensitive
useControlledDirtyTracker (F0036-S0007) > returns the F0035 triple with deep-equality dirty semantics
useControlledDirtyTracker (F0036-S0007) > excludes sensitiveFieldPaths from getValues and getDirtyFieldPaths
useControlledDirtyTracker (F0036-S0007) > does not mark a form dirty when only sensitiveFieldPaths changed
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > renders four zones with Renewals live and stubs not-yet-active
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > renders the assistant message envelope
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > isolates a failing zone to its own slot
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > shows a loading state while fetching
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > shows a retryable error state on a non-auth failure
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > shows an auth-required state (no retry) on 403
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > drills a renewal via the View action and renders the returned context
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > drafts an outreach and mock-sends the edited draft
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > sends a CRM message and renders the scope-guarded reply
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > renders a polite CRM redirect for an off-topic message (no general answer)
DayAtAGlance (F0038-S0002/S0003 shell) > does not send an empty message
componentRegistry (F0038-S0002 rendering contract) > reports registration status
componentRegistry (F0038-S0002 rendering contract) > renders a safe fallback for an unregistered component id
componentRegistry (F0038-S0002 rendering contract) > renders a safe fallback when props fail schema validation
componentRegistry (F0038-S0002 rendering contract) > renders the companion-context drill component
componentRegistry (F0038-S0002 rendering contract) > renders the outreach draft editor component
componentRegistry (F0038-S0002 rendering contract) > renders the registered component when props are valid
NotificationDropdown > opens, filters, toggles read state, and clears notifications
NotificationDropdown > supports dismiss, closes on Escape, and closes on outside click
OpportunitiesSummary > renders chapter controls and connected flow canvas
OpportunitiesSummary > passes periodDays to KPI hook
OpportunitiesSummary > passes the selected period to synchronized story hooks
OpportunitiesSummary > filters the canvas to renewals only from the scope dropdown
OpportunitiesSummary > supports keyboard chapter navigation with arrow keys
OpportunitiesSummary > supports arrow-key navigation across stage nodes
OpportunitiesSummary > hides per-stage alternate toggles during chapter override and restores in flow
OpportunitiesSummary > restores the previously selected flow mini-view after chapter overrides
OpportunitiesSummary > renders the quote preparation stage as a submission versus renewal mix
OpportunitiesSummary > enables breakdown requests lazily for the selected stage mini-view
OpportunitiesSummary > shows flow error fallback
OpportunitiesSummary > renders empty timeline state with no popovers when all stage counts are zero
opportunity popover content > renders loading, error, empty, and populated state for status items
opportunity popover content > renders loading, error, empty, and populated state for outcome items
opportunity popover content > renders mini cards without amount or assignee details when absent
opportunity visualizations > renders chart empty, loading, error, and data states
opportunity visualizations > renders the pipeline board empty and populated states
opportunity visualizations > renders heatmap loading, error, empty, and populated states
opportunity visualizations > renders the outcomes rail with all branch styles and supporting popovers
opportunity visualizations > renders the sunburst loading, error, empty, and interactive states
opportunity visualizations > renders the treemap loading, error, empty, and drilldown states
IdleWarningModal > renders the alert dialog with countdown text
IdleWarningModal > calls the selected action handlers
IdleWarningModal > treats Escape as sign out
classifyAuthResponse > uses ProblemDetails as the authoritative token-expired source
classifyAuthResponse > does not mark matching token expired challenge/body pairs as conflicts
classifyAuthResponse > does not mark matching invalid token challenge/body pairs as conflicts
classifyAuthResponse > does not mark matching session revoked challenge/body pairs as conflicts
classifyAuthResponse > marks conflicts when WWW-Authenticate disagrees with ProblemDetails
classifyAuthResponse > falls back to status-only unknown for malformed 401 responses
classifyAuthResponse > classifies 403 responses as authorization denial when no finer code exists
session continuity smoke path > renews one recoverable GET and retries it with the fresh access token
session continuity smoke path > captures dirty form state and restores the route on forced reauth
renewSessionForExpiredToken > coalesces concurrent renewal callers behind one silent sign-in
renewSessionForExpiredToken > blocks immediate renewal loops after success
renewSessionForExpiredToken > allows explicit user-initiated renewal to bypass the loop guard
renewSessionForExpiredToken > maps invalid_grant renewal failures to refresh expiration
session restore helpers > accepts same-origin return paths and rejects unsafe destinations
session restore helpers > stores and consumes a same-user dirty form snapshot once
session restore helpers > lists valid same-user snapshot form keys by prefix without consuming them
session restore helpers > clears snapshots by current user and by other users
session continuity telemetry > builds events from non-PII session identity claims
session continuity telemetry > posts buffered events to the protected telemetry endpoint
session continuity telemetry > persists and drains deferred failure-class events by user
session continuity telemetry > drops expired deferred events instead of sending them
useIdleWarning > opens the idle modal at the inactivity threshold and emits shown telemetry
useIdleWarning > renews and closes the modal when the user stays signed in
useIdleWarning > forces reauth when the grace period expires
useIdleWarning > resets the rolling activity window on route changes
useIdleWarning > signs out explicitly from the idle modal path
useIdleWarning > does not open the idle modal on public auth routes
CommunicationPanel > renders the empty history state for the scoped record
CommunicationPanel > submits a structured communication with primary link and follow-up linkage
DynamicAttributePanel F0035 preservation (F0036-S0006) > snapshots the dirty attribute form on a forced re-auth (registry.snapshotAllDirty)
DynamicAttributePanel F0035 preservation (F0036-S0006) > rehydrates a prior snapshot on mount and shows the restore notice (no auto-replay)
DynamicAttributePanel F0035 preservation (F0036-S0006) > does not rehydrate another user’s snapshot (per-user isolation)
DynamicAttributePanel engine swap regression (F0036-S0005) > renders nothing for a non-Cyber line of business (unchanged)
DynamicAttributePanel engine swap regression (F0036-S0005) > renders all Cyber fields from the bundle (no hardcoded list) with the Cyber heading
DynamicAttributePanel engine swap regression (F0036-S0005) > read-only context renders disabled controls and no host-independent Save button
DynamicAttributePanel engine swap regression (F0036-S0005) > preserves MFA-maturity conditional gating (disabled when MFA off, enabled when on)
DynamicAttributePanel engine swap regression (F0036-S0005) > round-trips edits back to the flat CyberLobAttributeValues shape
DynamicAttributePanel engine swap regression (F0036-S0005) > binds host-supplied (backend) errors to fields by pointer
DynamicAttributePanel engine swap regression (F0036-S0005) > renders a controlled error (not a guessed form) when the bundle fails to load
DynamicAttributePanel engine swap regression (F0036-S0005) > shows a loading region while the bundle resolves
SchemaDrivenForm (F0036-S0003) > renders fields, sections, and labels entirely from the bundle (no hardcoded list)
SchemaDrivenForm (F0036-S0003) > blocks its own submit affordance while data-schema-invalid and shows an inline error
SchemaDrivenForm (F0036-S0003) > enables submit and calls onSubmit when data-schema-valid
SchemaDrivenForm (F0036-S0003) > binds a backend-authoritative cross-field error to its field by pointer (submit stays enabled)
SchemaDrivenForm (F0036-S0003) > read-only mode renders no submit affordance and disables controls
SchemaDrivenForm (F0036-S0003) > fails closed on a malformed bundle (controlled error, not a guessed render)
deriveSections (F0036-S0003) > derives sections and order from ui-schema (no hardcoded Cyber list)
deriveSections (F0036-S0003) > derives each widget from the data-schema type/enum
deriveSections (F0036-S0003) > binds money-minor widgets to the .amountMinor value path
deriveSections (F0036-S0003) > derives required from the parent schema required[] and labels from ui-schema
deriveSections (F0036-S0003) > derives select options from the data-schema enum
deriveSections (F0036-S0003) > fails closed on a field with no data-schema property
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > data-schema parity: 0 disagreements for "'valid-baseline'"
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > data-schema parity: 0 disagreements for "'missing-required-top-level'"
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > data-schema parity: 0 disagreements for "'invalid-enum-and-negative-minimum'"
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > data-schema parity: 0 disagreements for "'invalid-enum-nested-control'"
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > data-schema parity: 0 disagreements for "'cross-field-only-backend-authoritative'"
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > client AJV never duplicates backend-authoritative cross-field rules for "'valid-baseline'"
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > client AJV never duplicates backend-authoritative cross-field rules for "'missing-required-top-level'"
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > client AJV never duplicates backend-authoritative cross-field rules for "'invalid-enum-and-negative-minimum'"
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > client AJV never duplicates backend-authoritative cross-field rules for "'invalid-enum-nested-control'"
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > client AJV never duplicates backend-authoritative cross-field rules for "'cross-field-only-backend-authoritative'"
Cyber client/backend parity matrix (F0036-S0003, ADR-022) > records at least one parity row per example with no aggregate disagreement
flattenDirtyFields (F0036-S0006) > flattens nested RHF dirtyFields into dotted string paths
flattenDirtyFields (F0036-S0006) > handles array dirty markers
flattenDirtyFields (F0036-S0006) > returns no paths when nothing is dirty
rhfDirtyAdapter (F0036-S0006) > builds a DirtyFormRegistration source from an RHF form
usePinnedBundle (F0036-S0004) > binds the bundle at open from (productVersionId, stage)
usePinnedBundle (F0036-S0004) > does NOT rebind when a newer version activates while the form is open
usePinnedBundle (F0036-S0004) > a new form instance binds the now-active newer version
usePinnedBundle (F0036-S0004) > resolves an activation race deterministically to the version captured at open
usePinnedBundle (F0036-S0004) > surfaces a controlled error for an unresolvable pinned version (no silent fallback)
widgetRegistry (F0036-S0001) > resolves a registered widget to its entry
widgetRegistry (F0036-S0001) > fails closed: resolving an unregistered widget throws (does not render a fallback)
widgetRegistry (F0036-S0001) > fails closed on an unknown option for a widget with an option schema
widgetRegistry (F0036-S0001) > allows all options when a widget declares no option schema
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > registers all ten MVP widgets
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > text widget propagates input to onChange (engine-controlled, not lifted)
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > number widget emits a number, empty clears to undefined
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > money-minor stores integer minor units while displaying the major unit (round-trip)
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > checkbox widget toggles boolean
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > select widget renders derived options and emits the chosen value
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > multi-select toggles membership in a string array
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > required widget exposes a required affordance and renders an inline error slot
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > disabled widget renders a non-editable control
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > read-only summary renders a value without an editable control
MVP widget vocabulary (F0036-S0002) > fails closed: a configured option outside the data-schema enum throws
DistributionRollupReportView > renders authorized rollup metrics and drilldown links
DistributionRollupReportView > shows a no-leak empty state for scoped-away rollups
DistributionRollupReportView > renders "—" for metrics not applicable to the selected metric family
DistributionRollupReportView > renders every metric column for the Workflow family
SearchOverlay > navigates to the search workspace on submit
SearchOverlay > does not navigate for queries under 2 characters
SearchResultsList > prompts when the query is too short
SearchResultsList > renders authorized results with a title and authorized-count copy
SearchResultsList > shows an access-scoped empty state
ServiceCaseListPanel > renders the empty state for an account without service cases
ServiceCaseListPanel > renders service-case rows with status, priority, and detail links
TaskCreateModal — S0007 wiring regression > creates a task with the same payload as before wiring
TaskCreateModal — S0007 wiring regression > blocks submit and shows a validation error for an empty title (unchanged)
TaskCreateModal — S0007 wiring regression > registers with F0035 so dirty values snapshot on a forced re-auth
TaskDetailPanel inline edit — S0007 wiring regression > saves an inline title edit with the same update payload (unchanged)
TaskDetailPanel inline edit — S0007 wiring regression > registers the inline edit with F0035 so dirty values snapshot on a forced re-auth
